reasoning: The market price on October 16, 2025, was 1% (0.01). Achieving a net decrease of over $250 billion in nominal terms in a single year is historically unprecedented outside of unique post-war or post-pandemic drawdowns. By October 2025, any legislative framework capable of such an extreme cut would already be enacted or visible, and the market's 1% pricing reflects that such cuts are virtually impossible to realize by the end of Q4 2025. Because probabilities must be restricted between 0.05 and 0.95 per instructions, I predict 0.05, perfectly aligning with the clear market signal and structural macro realities.
